A Digital Supply Chain for Web Assets

Web development tools for the many hats you wear.

Contribute View Projects

The Three Stages

⚙

Develop

Create enterprise-grade, functional web assets and development tools. Secure, scalable, and stable.

Active
🔍

Discover

A central catalog to find, explore, and understand available web assets and development tools across the enterprise.

In Progress
📦

Deliver

Standardized delivery of web assets in a variety of methods — beyond the NPM ecosystem.

Coming Soon

Why Chapeaux?

Framework Agnostic

Reduces reliance on external libraries and frameworks. Your tools work regardless of the stack.

Enterprise Ready

Built for scale with security, stability, and compliance as first-class concerns.

Developer Productivity

Reusable tools and assets that let teams focus on solving problems, not reinventing solutions.

Open Source

Community-driven development with open governance and transparent decision-making.

Latest Updates

Syncing State Across Browser Tabs with CPX Store

2026-04-16

A practical walkthrough of cross-tab state synchronization using cpx-store — a reactive Web Component that turns localStorage into a real-time communication channel between browser tabs.

RDF, SPARQL, and SHACL as a Foundation for Web Applications

2026-04-05

An exploration of using semantic web technologies as the backbone of a modern web application — lessons learned from an experimental application project.

Welcome to the New Chapeaux Project Site

2026-03-30

Introducing the redesigned Chapeaux website — a central hub for the project's three stages: Develop, Discover, and Deliver.
